01 / Story

From the Congo to the World

A Congolese immigrant who grew up in Revere, MA. A love for math, chemistry, and sports led to chemical engineering — and a life defined by purpose, grit, and service.

Education & Certifications

MS Chemical Engineering from Northeastern. BS from UMass Lowell. Gordon Institute Leadership. ICCC. Cambridge CIC. Gauntlet AI. CQA in progress.

Life's Work & Community

Brilla Life Sciences. Brillaverse. Big Brothers Big Sisters. Haymakers for Hope. Rodman for Kids. Jonathan shows up where it matters most.

04 / Personal Brand

Teba — Beyond the Lab

Teba Fit. Fitness training. Modeling with Dynasty Models. Basketball since age five. Spartan racing. Boxing. Jonathan's identity goes well beyond the engineering lab.
